description: After a buyer's agent shows a property, the listing agent follows up to request feedback.

nodes.task_description: Identify that a showing was completed the previous day.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent's system flags a completed showing.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated email or text to the buyer's agent with a link to a feedback form.
Compile any feedback received and share it with the seller.

expected_outcome.expected: The seller receives a summary of feedback from recent showings.
